meanings.definition: an injectable form of benzodiazepine (trade name Versed) useful for sedation and for reducing pain during uncomfortable medical procedures
compose verses or put into verse
familiarize through thorough study or experience
examples: She versed herself in Roman archeology

meanings.definition: thoroughly acquainted through study or experience; -W.H.Hudson; - Herbert Read
examples: this girl, so intimate with nature
knowledgeable about the technique of painting
